items.title: Dwight Howard & Josiah Johnson On Gil's Arena Crash Outs & Pops Marques Johnson
items.body_excerpt: Dwight Howard & Mu Real get into it with Former college baller and now producer of Gil's Arena, Josiah Johnson. They talk all about NBA fathers and what it was truly like to be the son of Marques Johnson and how now, their relationship has never been better. When Josiah was a…

items.title: Why NASCAR Was Scared of the Name 'Talladega Nights'
items.body_excerpt: Will Ferrell reveals why NASCAR almost rejected the title Talladega Nights, how John C. Reilly pushed Step Brothers into existence, and the rule that he and Adam McKay never write a character until the name is right. Plus the fan who got genuinely mad at him for forgetting his…
